data.heading: About the Practice
paragraphs: Based in the nexus of academic inquiry and clinical application, my work focuses on how environmental stressors reshape neural pathways. By integrating high-frequency behavioral data with traditional psychotherapy, we uncover actionable patterns for mental resilience.

My philosophy is rooted in Radical Transparency. Patients and research participants alike are viewed as collaborative partners in the quest for understanding. This editorial-driven approach ensures that findings are not just statistically significant, but humanly resonant.

cards.title: Academic Rigor
cards.text: Methodologies grounded in peer-reviewed ethics and reproducible data sets.

cards.title: Patient Centricity
cards.text: Evidence-based care tailored to individual neuro-diversity and cultural context.
